criteria_audit.gap: Prototype has no dailycheckin or user streak columns; streak persisted in profiles.onboarding_data. Streak math is client-side yesterday-continuation, not full bTIWG scheduled cancellation chain.

gaps.finding: Prototype frontend/supabase has no dailycheckin table or user streak columns; submit falls back to profiles.onboarding_data.daily_checkins.
Decompose AC-3 cites workflow bTIqQ (ButtonClicked ChangePage in IR), but Bubble submit button ai_RNbBHXRw schedules API event bTIWG (NewThing + ChangeThing + scheduled streak reset).
evidence: ir/inventory.json — bTIqQ trigger_type ButtonClicked, action ChangePage
drsam-99657.bubble — ai_RNbBHXRw workflow action ScheduleAPIEvent bTIWG

gaps.finding: When dailycheckin insert succeeds, streak is still computed from onboarding_data dates only, not from table history.

critiques.finding: Streak calculation ignores dailycheckin table rows after a successful insert; only onboarding_data history is consulted, so production schema would under-count consecutive days.
critiques.alternative: After insert, query dailycheckin dates for the user (or mirror Bubble bTIWG server-side streak rules) before updating daily_check_in_streak_number.

critiques.finding: bTIXh (mood label text) is nested under ai_RNbBHXRi; IR inventory lists bTIXh as direct child of ai_RNbBHXRh alongside ai_RNbBHXRi.
critiques.alternative: Render bTIXh as sibling of ai_RNbBHXRi inside ai_RNbBHXRh to match Bubble element tree.

critiques.finding: Bubble bTIWG chains CancelScheduledAPIEvent + ScheduleAPIEvent for streak reset on missed days; client uses simplified yesterday-continuation only.
critiques.alternative: Document as intentional prototype scope or port bTIWr deferred streak-reset API when backend tables land.
evidence: ir/inventory.json — bTIWG actions CancelScheduledAPIEvent, ScheduleAPIEvent bTIWr

critiques.finding: Streak badge group ai_RNbBHXRd is hidden when streak is 0; Bubble binds badge to user data but may still render the group container.
critiques.alternative: Show badge with '0 day streak' or match Bubble visibility conditions from user data binding.

critiques.finding: Bubble submit workflow includes ResetInputs after ScheduleAPIEvent; React clears reflection only, leaving mood/energy at submitted values.
critiques.alternative: Reset sliders to defaults after successful submit to mirror ResetInputs.
